name: Improper Neutralization of Variable Name Delimiters
description: The product does not properly neutralize characters that delimit variable names (e.g., ${}, %%, @@) in user input, allowing attackers to inject variable references that the downstream component expands to reveal sensitive values or alter execution.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing variable name delimiter characters that flows to EXTERNAL[template_engine|shell] without a TRANSFORM[variable_delimiter_escape] that neutralizes the delimiters before the data reaches the variable expansion engine
